languages.text: "Командный штаб выстоял под вражескими ударами, и потери среди личного состава минимальны. Это дает нам преимущество".

Не играет DL_LariaOnJuvennaSide

languages.text: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."
languages.original_text: "Командный штаб выстоял под вражескими ударами, и потери среди личного состава минимальны. Это дает нам преимущество".

traits.locale_text: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."
"The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."
"The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."

languages.text: “指挥部挺过了敌方的打击，人员损耗微乎其微。我们赢得了优势。”
languages.original_text: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."

traits.locale_text: “指挥部挺过了敌方的打击，人员损耗微乎其微。我们赢得了优势。”

languages.text: « Le quartier général de commandement a su résister aux frappes de l'ennemi et nous dénombrons très peu de victimes, ce qui nous donne un avantage. »
languages.original_text: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."

traits.locale_text: « Le quartier général de commandement a su résister aux frappes de l'ennemi et nous dénombrons très peu de victimes, ce qui nous donne un avantage. »

languages.text: «El centro de mando ha resistido los ataques del enemigo y las bajas son mínimas. Eso nos da una ventaja».
languages.original_text: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."

traits.locale_text: «El centro de mando ha resistido los ataques del enemigo y las bajas son mínimas. Eso nos da una ventaja».

languages.text: "Komuta karargâhı, düşman saldırılarına dayandı. Kayıplar minimum düzeyde. Bu bize avantaj sağlıyor."
languages.original_text: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."

traits.locale_text: "Komuta karargâhı, düşman saldırılarına dayandı. Kayıplar minimum düzeyde. Bu bize avantaj sağlıyor."

languages.text: "Das Hauptquartier hat den Angriffen des Feindes standgehalten und unsere Verluste sind minimal. Das verschafft uns einen Vorteil."
languages.original_text: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."

traits.locale_text: "Das Hauptquartier hat den Angriffen des Feindes standgehalten und unsere Verluste sind minimal. Das verschafft uns einen Vorteil."

languages.text: 「司令部が敵の攻撃に耐え、被害は最小限。これは我々に有利だ」
languages.original_text: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."

traits.locale_text: 「司令部が敵の攻撃に耐え、被害は最小限。これは我々に有利だ」
